heading: Repealed. ,Dec. 17, 1943, ch. 344, § 157 Stat. 600
label: 299 Repealed. ,Dec. 17, 1943, ch. 344, § 157 Stat. 600
notes: Section, , , provided for delivery by the marshal, of all Chinese persons ordered deported under judicial writs, into the custody of any officer designated for that purpose, for conveyance to the frontier or seaboard for deportation.act June 23, 1913, ch. 3, § 138 Stat. 65
